title: Gnarled Hammer
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Enchant[/gold] up to [blue]3[/blue] Attacks with [purple]Sharp[/purple] [blue]+3[/blue].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Automatically opens a card selection dialog upon pickup to choose up to 3 Attack cards to enchant with Sharp +3. The selection is mandatory and requires manual confirmation.
